es.seo_description: Calcula el IVA de cualquier precio al instante. Introduce el precio sin IVA y el porcentaje para obtener el precio final.
es.example_label: Adding 21% VAT to a €249.99 product price to find the final consumer price.
es.result_context: The iva_importe of {iva_importe} is the VAT amount. The precio_con_iva of {precio_con_iva} is the total price customers pay.
mistakes: Applying wrong VAT rate for the product category (reduced vs standard)
Calculating VAT from the gross price instead of net price
Forgetting that some products are VAT-exempt or have reduced rates
